ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "tong_luc" INTEGER /* Tong luc ( Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "total_2rice_luk" INTEGER /* Total 2 rice luk (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "total_rice_shrimp" INTEGER /* Total rice shrimp (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "tong_tsl" INTEGER /* Tong tsl (Vietnamese term for total agricultural land use) */,
  "tong_bhk" INTEGER /* Tong bhk (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "total_fruit_tree_lnk" INTEGER /* Total fruit tree lnk (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "farming_practice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farming practice */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop */,
  "agricultural_land_use_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agricultural land use type */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_agricultural_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("agricultural_land_use_id") REFERENCES agricultural_land_use ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data_sources ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_farming_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("farming_practice_id") REFERENCES farming_practices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "climate_maxTAS_shrimp" REAL /* Maximum temperature for shrimp farming */,
  "climate_maxPR_thuysan" REAL /* Maximum precipitation for thuysan (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "climate_maxTAS_caytrong" REAL /* Maximum temperature for caytrong (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "climate_minPR_caytrong" REAL /* Minimum precipitation for caytrong (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "climate_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES climate_data_sources ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_climate_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "area_shrimp_tsl_risk" INTEGER /* Area at risk for shrimp farming in tsl (Vietnamese term for a type of agricultural land use) */,
  "area_rice_fruit_tree_risk" INTEGER /* Area at risk for rice and fruit tree farming */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location */,
  "risk_assessment_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_risk_assessment_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_assessment_model_id") REFERENCES risk_assessment_models ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farming_practices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farming practice */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the farming practice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the farming practice */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the farming practice */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the farming practice */,
  "challenges" TEXT /* Challenges associated with the farming practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "growing_season" TEXT /* Growing season(s) of the crop */,
  "optimal_conditions" TEXT /* Optimal growing conditions for the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_land_use" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural land use */,
  "land_use_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural land use */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agricultural land use */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the agricultural land use */,
  "suitable_crops" TEXT /* Crops suitable for the land use type */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the land use type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the climate model */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the climate model */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Limitations of the climate model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment_models" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk assessment model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk assessment model */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the risk assessment model */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the risk assessment model */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the risk assessment model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, policymaker, farmer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g. view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agricultural data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment_outputs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment output */,
  "risk_assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment model used */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk assessment output */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Value of the risk assessment output */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk assessment output */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the output value */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date and time the output was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
